calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn For Leave To Amend To Add Deft Levi'S Only Stores Inc In Place Of Number 1
Off Calendar Mar-14-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF KELLY BECERRA's Motion For Leave To Amend To Add Defendant Levi's Only Stores Inc In Place Of Number 1 is granted. Plaintiff demonstrates good cause for the motion pursuant to CCP 473 and 474. (The Court will sign the proposed order sent by email.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
